NatBindEip.natId: The ID of the NAT gateway to bind the EIP to
NatBindEip.clientToken: Idempotency token, an ASCII string of up to 64 characters. See [ClientToken Idempotency](VPC/API参考/通用说明.md#幂等性)
NatBindEip.bindEips: List of EIPs to bind to the NAT gateway; multiple EIPs are supported, but all must be within the same shared bandwidth package or none of them in any shared bandwidth package
